hooks.command: cd apps/web && output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[tsc] $output" | head -20; fi
cd apps/web && output=$(npx eslint --cache --quiet . 2>&1 | head -15); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[eslint] $output"; fi

if echo "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT}" | grep -qiE '(auth|rls|migration|policy)'; then echo '[pgTAP] Auth/RLS file changed — running supabase test db...'; cd /Users/bradygrapentine/Documents/projects/carelog && output=$(supabase test db 2>&1); echo "$output" | tail -20; fi
